name: Learning Structural Manipulability in Gate-Level Netlists Using Graph Neural Networks

description: arXiv:2607.16245v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: Gate-level netlists exhibit intrinsic structural properties that influence signal propagation independently of functional simulation. We define a topology-driven structural manipulability score that characterizes node-level structural flexibility using path participation, k-core embedding, symmetry, and centrality. Modeling netlists as directed...
author: Rupesh Raj Karn, Ozgur Sinanoglu
